subject: Laptop won't power on
description: My laptop screen stays completely black and the power button LED doesn't light up at all. I left it plugged in overnight and it still does not turn on. I need it for a client demo in 2 hours.

subject: Request for a second monitor
description: I would like to request an additional external monitor for my desk to improve productivity when working with multiple windows. No urgency, whenever it's convenient.

subject: Outlook keeps crashing on launch
description: Every time I open Outlook on my Windows laptop it freezes for 10 seconds and then closes itself. This started after this morning's Windows update. I have restarted twice but the issue persists.

subject: Need Adobe Photoshop installed
description: Could someone please install Adobe Photoshop on my workstation? I need it for some design work next week, no immediate deadline.

subject: Cannot connect to office VPN
description: Since this morning I keep getting an authentication error when trying to connect to the corporate VPN from home. I have tried restarting my laptop twice. I cannot access any internal systems and have a deadline today.

subject: Wi-Fi very slow on 4th floor
description: The Wi-Fi connection on the 4th floor near the east wing has been extremely slow for the past hour, pages take over a minute to load. Multiple colleagues nearby are affected.

subject: Locked out of company email
description: I forgot my email password and after 3 failed attempts my account is now locked. I need access urgently to respond to a client before noon today.

subject: Need access to shared finance drive
description: I recently joined the finance team and need read/write access to the shared 'Finance-Reports' network drive. My manager has already approved this over email.

subject: Office printer on 2nd floor showing paper jam
description: The HP printer near the 2nd floor pantry shows a paper jam error but there is no visible paper stuck inside. We are unable to print anything from that printer.

subject: How do I set up email signature?
description: Could someone share the steps or template to set up the standard company email signature in Outlook? Not urgent, just need it for reference.

subject: Production database is down
description: Our main production database server is not responding to any connections since 10 minutes ago. The customer-facing application is completely down and we are getting alerts from monitoring. This needs immediate attention.

subject: Password reset for new joiner
description: New employee starting Monday needs their initial account password reset and a temporary password issued so they can log in on their first day.
